news.t: Not All Diversification Strategies Are Equal
3 Ways to Mitigate Concentration Risk in Portfolios
ALPS EQL Swaps SPDR ETFs for New VettaFi Index
SS&C ALPS Advisors Announces Share Split of the ALPS Equal Sector Weight ETF (EQL)

holdings.infoBox: EQL is an equity ETF with a total of 499 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.42%, Amazon.com at 3.54%, Exxon Mobil at 2.36%, NVIDIA at 2.24%, and Linde at 2.09%.

overview.description: The Alps Equal Sector Weight ETF (EQL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Select Sector Equal Weight index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap companies, from the VettaFi US Equity Large-Cap 500 Index, grouped into the 11 GICS economic sectors. Each sector is equally-weighted with the constituents market cap-weighted within. EQL was launched on Jul 7, 2009 and is issued by SS&C.
infoTable: NYSE Select Sector Equal Weight Index

data.title: Not All Diversification Strategies Are Equal
data.text: Advisors searching for diversification from a concentrated S&P 500 Index often reach for equal-weight strategies. However, a new report argues that all equal-weight approaches are not interchangeable.
